monitor.capture_what: The file path argument passed to open() — confirms whether a traversal or absolute path reaches the sink

oracle_check.condition_description: The path argument to open() contains '../' traversal sequences or is an absolute path pointing outside the cache directory (e.g., /etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, /proc/self/environ)
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PATH_INJECTION: Arbitrary file read via unsanitized path — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

_meta.function_signature: def postprocess_image(format: str, value: np.ndarray | PIL.Image.Image | str | Path | None, cache_dir: str, watermark: WatermarkOptions | None)
